command_executions.verification_command: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo run --quiet -p codedb -- doctor --nu --format json && cargo run --quiet -p codedb -- doctor --yazelix --format json && cargo run --quiet -p codedb -- doctor --codex --format json
python3 -m unittest tests.test_truth_surface && python3 scripts/truth_surface.py --check && python3 scripts/truth_surface.py --check-source

python3 -m unittest tests.test_runtime_tool_contract && nix build .#checks.$(nix eval --raw --impure --expr builtins.currentSystem).codedb_runtime_tool_smoke --no-link --no-write-lock-file && codedb --version && test -x "$(command -v nu_plugin_codedb)"
cargo test -p codedb --test compiler_capture_cli && cargo test -p codedb-rust-static
cargo test -p codedb --test build_capture_cli && cargo test -p codedb-build-capture
cargo test -p codedb-core --test materialization_paths && cargo test -p codedb --test symlink_capture_roundtrip && cargo test -p codedb-store-redb
cargo test -p codedb --test build_capture_cli && cargo test -p codedb-build-capture -p codedb-rust-static
cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features && cargo test --workspace --all-features

tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; mkdir "$tmpdir/envctl"; git -C ../envctl archive HEAD | tar -x -C "$tmpdir/envctl"; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root "$tmpdir/envctl" scan --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db query --preset root-meta --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root ../envctl refactor --from META_ROOT --to LIFE_OS_ROOT --json

tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root ../envctl refactor --from META_ROOT --to LIFE_OS_ROOT --render-out "$tmpdir/envctl-lifeos-refactor" --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db impact --symbol META_ROOT --json
tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db deploy --kind hooks --target "$tmpdir/lifeos-deploy-test" --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db widget roots --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root ../envctl widget refs --json
cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db widget hooks --json

tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmpdir"' EXIT; mkdir "$tmpdir/envctl"; git -C ../envctl archive HEAD | tar -x -C "$tmpdir/envctl"; cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root "$tmpdir/envctl" scan --json && cargo run --manifest-path ../envctl/Cargo.toml -p envctl -- db --repo-root "$tmpdir/envctl" watch --json
